metadata.description: End-of-session wrap-up. Summarizes the session, saves key memories, and pushes a session log to a NotebookLM AI Brain notebook.

plugins.name: wrapup
plugins.description: End-of-session wrap-up — summarizes the session, saves key memories, and pushes a session log to the user's AI Brain NotebookLM notebook. Auto-triggers on PreCompact, SessionEnd, and /clear.
